bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_custom_heading text=”Are you experiencing Issues Accessing Netflix on Your Vision Plus
TV? We’re Here to Help” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left|color:%23472f8f”][vc_column_text]We understand that some of our customers may be experiencing issues with Netflix on their Vision Plus TVs, particularly those running Android TV AOSP version 9 and older.
We’re actively working to address this and provide a solution.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_custom_heading text=”Why is this happening?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left|color:%23472f8f”][vc_column_text]Due to recent changes in Netflix’s app compatibility requirements, many TV models and brands worldwide, including some Vision Plus Android TVs, are currently unable to access the Netflix app.

If you get any of the error messages below, your TV may be affected by the changes Netflix has made to its App compatibility:

“Netflix is no longer available on this device. Please visit
netflix.com/compatibledevices for a list of supported devices.”

“Netflix will no longer be available on this device after [DATE]. Please visit netflix.com/compatibledevices for a list of supported devices”, or

“This version of Netflix app is not compatible with your device. (-13)”,[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_custom_heading text=”Our Commitment to you” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left|color:%23472f8f”][vc_column_text]We understand this situation is frustrating. Our technicians are dedicated to finding solutions and have developed ways to extend Netflix compatibility on affected Vision Plus 43” Android TVs (Model Number: VP8843SF) for a while longer.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_custom_heading text=”How can we help” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left|color:%23472f8f”][vc_custom_heading text=”Option 1: Visit our Service center” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left|color:%23472f8f”][vc_column_text]You can bring your TV to our service center on the Ground Floor, Gallant Mall, where our technicians will update your TV’s operating system. You should have your TV back within 48 hours.[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Option 2: For the Tech Savvy, Update from Home” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left|color:%23472f8f”][vc_column_text]

CRITICAL WARNING: This update is exclusively for Vision Plus TV model VP8843SF (43” ANDROID TV) with panel numbers PT430CT02_1 or PT430CT02_4. Attempting this update on any other TV model may cause irreversible damage. Verify your panel number in the factory settings before proceeding.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][nectar_btn size=”small” button_style=”regular” button_color_2=”Accent-Color” icon_family=”none” text=”Click Here for Instructions” url=”/support/netflix/advancedfix/”][divider line_type=”Full Width Line” line_thickness=”2″ divider_color=”black”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_custom_heading text=”TV Upgrade Option” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left|color:%23472f8f”][vc_column_text]We understand that this situation is frustrating. Unfortunately, due to the nature of these changes from Netflix, some older TV models may no longer be compatible with their app, even with updates.

In this case, the only solution is to upgrade your TV to a newer model with the latest Android Operating system, or one using a Netflix Certified Operating System like Vidaa.

While we can’t control Netflix’s compatibility decisions, we value your loyalty. If your TV is affected, we’re offering an exclusive discount on a new Vision Plus TV so you can continue enjoying your favorite shows and movies.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default”
